title: eriogonum jamesii var. xanthum
intro: Eriogonum jamesii var. xanthum, also known as James' buckwheat or desert buckwheat, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum jamesii var. xanthum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
